query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ropa_config' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
